control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
axi_vga.rdl

Description

Control register

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] - - - -
[2] vsync_pol rw 0x1 vsync_pol
[1] hsync_pol rw 0x1 hsync_pol
[0] enable rw 0x0 enable

Field Descriptions

vsync_pol - vsync_pol

Sets polarity for VSYNC. 0 - Active Low, 1 - Active High.

hsync_pol - hsync_pol

Sets polarity for HSYNC. 0 - Active Low, 1 - Active High.

enable - enable

Enables FSM.
